narrative:
Bexley 4-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 478 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.7 percentage points.
